title: IShowSpeed set for WWE debut at WrestleMania 42 in six-man tag match
summary_full: IShowSpeed is set to make his WWE in-ring debut at WrestleMania 42 on April 18-19, 2026, teaming with Logan Paul and Austin Theory against The Usos and LA Knight. Despite prior WWE appearances and viral moments, this marks his first official match. The storyline also involves a potential continuation of Danhausen's "curse" impacting Speed during the bout.
